column19: Public formation-services hub; public site advertises company registration, bank accounts, payment merchants/payment gateway support, and UK/Pakistan presence.
column20: 2026-04-01 update: Companies House shows HOPETEX LIMITED (14684061) active at 85 Dunstall Hill, incorporated 2023-02-23, with Imran Hyder listed as active PSC (Pakistani; country of residence Pakistan). HopeTex web properties advertise UK/US company formation and package features including registered office / director service address, business service address, UK mobile/SIM/eSIM, payment-merchant guidance, and - on the UK LTD packages page - features such as proxy, merchant-guideline videos, and, in the Diamond package, claimed Stripe/PayPal/Wise approvals plus anti-detect browser and private proxy.
column22: 2026-04-01 web refresh: hopetexx.com/packages currently shows US LLC packages; the UK LTD package breakdown is publicly visible at hopetex.co.uk/product-category/packages/. Treat all service/approval claims as website marketing claims, not independent verification.
column28: 85 Dunstall Hill
column30: Official filing + website update captured. UK LTD package page lists Starter, Silver, Gold, Platinum, VAT and Diamond tiers. Diamond includes registered office, director service address, business service address, Stripe Business Approval, PayPal Business Approval, Wise Business Approval, Wise virtual cards, dedicated anti-detect browser, dedicated private proxy, and UK mobile number. Platinum includes free residential proxy plus Wise/Stripe/PayPal/Payoneer guideline videos. hopetexx.com footer/contact text also ties the brand to 85 Dunstall Hill and Lahore, Pakistan.
column33: Repository README and HopeTex section describe HopeTex as a facilitator / formation-agent node tied to 85 Dunstall Hill packages. This is a repository assertion and should be handled as an investigative claim unless separately verified.
